sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n49204" key="qronopoio/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θρονοποιός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n49204.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">making thrones</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seats</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:182" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.182</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
